errors.invcreds: Invalid login credentials. Please try again.
errors.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.UserShort: The username/email format is invalid. Try a different username or email.
errors.noConnectedAccount: No existing Openlearn account is connected to this provider.
errors.AccountDisabled: This account has been permanently disabled due to a violation of our terms of use. Contact support@polarlearn.nl.
errors.ProviderDisabled: This sign-in method is inactive. Please try another sign-in method.
errors.OauthError: A problem occurred while using OAuth 2.1.
errors.Ratelimit: Whoa, slow down. You're going too fast. Please try again in a few seconds.

500.title: I fucked up
500.message: Somthing went wrong on my end.

errors.unknown: Congrats! You found an new error! Please report this on the github!

api.unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
api.forbidden: You do not have permission to do this.
api.notFound: This item could not be found.
api.badRequest: Some input is invalid. Please check your data and try again.
api.timeout: The request took too long. Please try again.
api.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
api.internal: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
api.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
api.forumLoad: Could not load forum posts right now.
api.reviewQueueLoad: Could not load the moderation queue right now.
api.createPost: Could not create your post. Please try again.
api.vote: Could not save your vote. Please try again.
api.reply: Could not post your reply. Please try again.

startPage.description: This is not the complete version of Openlearn yet. This is only the forum beta version.
